creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

Unless you can provide patches, there's not a great deal that can 
be done here.  -current is so hideously unstable right now, that until 
such time as I can actually get a crashbox to last long enough to even 
build GNOME, you're out of luck (and probably shouldn't be running 
-current in the first place, IMO)
